calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-09-2005 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2004 Continued To Feb-18-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-04-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Doughas Hollowar, Esq. for Plaintiff: Trinity Capital Corporation.
Declaration of Ernest Knowles in file.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Ovidiu J. Furdui as follows:
Principal $26,347.16
Interest $1,717.22
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $327.50 for a total of $30,891.88
Judgment signed in open court.

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-03-2004 Text Ruling
